hero.title: Mohamed Rayen Chati
hero.subtitle: Software Engineering Student
hero.description: I build modern web applications and I enjoy working with React, Java, C++ and SQL. Welcome to my personal portfolio website.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am an Informatics student at FH Aachen with a strong focus on frontend development. I enjoy building modern, responsive, and user-friendly interfaces, with attention to performance and clean design. I work mainly with React, JavaScript, and CSS, and I am continuously improving my skills to create intuitive and high-quality user experiences.
about.projects: I work on different modern software projects.
about.goals: My goal is to become a strong full-stack developer.

school.title: School Learning Platform
school.description: A collaborative school web platform where teachers can upload exercises and courses, while students can access all their study materials in one place. The project was developed in a team with 2 frontend members and 4 backend members.

emensa.title: E-Mensa Website
emensa.description: A web application for e-mensa services developed with HTML, CSS and MariaDB. The project focused on building a clean user interface and managing data efficiently through a database-driven structure.

todo.title: To-Do List Web App
todo.description: A React-based task management web application that allows users to add, organize, and manage daily tasks through a modern and interactive interface with a clean frontend experience.

experience.subtitle: WHAT I HAVE DONE SO FAR
experience.title: Work Experience.

algorithms.title: Algorithms and Graph Theory in C++
algorithms.point1: Implemented several TSP algorithms such as Nearest Neighbor, Double Tree, and Kruskal in C++.
algorithms.point2: Developed automated tests with Catch2 to ensure correctness and performance.

bank.title: Java Banking Management System
bank.point1: Developed an object-oriented banking management system in Java with class hierarchy, inheritance, and error handling.
bank.point2: Focused on encapsulation, clean code structure, and maintainable software architecture.

servicenow.title: ServiceNow Parking App
servicenow.point1: Developed a campus application for managing parking spaces with roles, ACLs, and flows.
servicenow.point2: Implemented user-friendly interfaces using UI Builder.

webapp.title: Web App with HTML, CSS, PHP and MariaDB
webapp.point1: Built an interactive web application with frontend in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
webapp.point2: Integrated backend using PHP and MariaDB, including SQL queries and form processing.

linux.title: Linux Administration and Virtualization
linux.point1: Set up and administered virtual Linux environments with Ubuntu and Debian.
linux.point2: Deepened knowledge in Vagrant, VirtualBox, shell scripting, and networking fundamentals.

todo.title: To-Do List Web App (Vanilla JavaScript)
todo.point1: Developed a dynamic To-Do List web application using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.
todo.point2: Implemented DOM manipulation, event handling, and interactive UI features.
